results.title: Introducing: Indie Brand Breva Genève is back, with the new Segreto di Lario
results.content:
The first collection for the brand’s second chapter and the inaugural model of this resurrection is named “Segreto di Lario” – Secret of Lake Como in Italian. If this poetic name sounds a bit cryptic, it does make sense, knowing that the name Breva itself comes from the breeze that blows over Lake Como. From a design perspective, the Segreto di Lario marks quite a departure from the bold 2010s Genie series. It indeed comes in an elegant 41mm cushion-shape case in 18l pink gold. It still feels creative, and it still displays its inner workings, but it feels more anchored in classic haute horlogerie, and now has reasonable proportions, including a fair thickness of 11mm.

Ad – Scroll to continue with article [...] |  By Xavier Markl  |  3 min read  |

Swiss brand Breva Genève was founded in 2010 by Vincent Dupontreué. At one point, the brand garnered quite a bit of attention on the independent watchmaking scene with a series of original but niche complications such as a barometer, an altimeter or even a retractable speedometer! For multiple reasons, the brand unfortunately disappeared for a few years. But in 2025, the independent watchmaking brand is now resurrected by Julien Haenny – Ex-HYT, The Fine Watch Club, Anonimo, Vulcain, Jaeger-Lecoultre and TechnoMarine. And here’s what to expect from the new version of Breva Genève, an elegant watch with an original power reserve display named the Segreto di Lario. [...] Indeed, this movement is clearly publicised as a joint creation with movement maker Chronode (also behind the conception of the first Genie models), and is derived from the company’s twin-barrel calibre with its 3Hz frequency and lengthy 7-day power reserve – an identical architecture can be seen, for instance, at Czapek or Fleming. Elegantly finished, it is visible through the watch exhibition caseback, and it emphasizes traditional techniques with vertical Geneva stripes and a wind rose engraved on one of the barrels.

The Breva Segreto di Lario is worn on an alligator leather strap closed by a pin buckle. It is released in a limited edition of 25 pieces. The price is set at CHF 58,000, excluding taxes. For more information, please visit www.breva-watches.com.

results.title: Home | Breva Watches
results.content:
Discover

## The brand

BREVA GENEVE reinterprets classical watch complications, blending Italian elegance with Swiss precision. Inspired by Lake Como, our exclusive, limited-edition timepieces are crafted for discerning collectors. Discover our "Instruments of Time" — where timeless craftsmanship meets unprecedented design.

Discover Breva

## Latest news

Segreto di Lario Slate Grey or Sunset: Exploring the most captivating hours of the Dolce Vita

Spiritus subtilitatis The high watchmaking timepiece-instrument

Presentation of the two other models in the Segreto di Lario collection

All News

## Would you like to know more?

Do you have any questions about our watches? Our team is at your disposal and will respond as soon as possible.

Contact us [...] 68'000 CHF

(before taxes)

## Origins of Breva

During a weekend by the shores of Lake Como in 2010, a young entrepreneur conceived the idea of creating a luxury watch brand – a mechanical timepiece capable of forecasting the weather. Inspired by the region’s natural beauty and "La Breva," a warm southern wind, the name "Breva Geneve" was born.

Know more

## Segreto di Lario

A masterpiece inspired by the Italian elegance of Lake Como and the timekeeping instruments of the great explorers of yesteryear.

Discover
